_comment: CTR-optimized title/description overrides for the highest-impression GSC pages. 'title' (when present) is used verbatim as the final <title> (no '| ClaritX' suffix appended) and is kept <=60 chars; it leads with the EXACT query the page wins impressions for. 'description' is pure CTR (answer-first + the 9-perspective-AI/free differentiator + 2026 freshness), <=158 chars, zero ranking risk. Applied at build time (generate-spa-fallbacks.js) AND client-side (BlogPost.tsx) so the static snippet and the rendered page match. Add a slug here only after checking its winning query in GSC.

10-best-dividend-stocks-under-50-safe-be.title: Best Dividend Stocks for Beginners: 10 Picks Under $50
10-best-dividend-stocks-under-50-safe-be.description: The 10 best dividend stocks for beginners in 2026 — all under $50 and ranked by our 9-perspective AI. See yields, payout safety, and the full free report.

buffett-indicator-flashes-red-2026-marke.description: See the Buffett Indicator's current 2026 level, how it compares to history, and what record market-cap-to-GDP valuations mean for your portfolio.

warren-buffetts-favorite-safe-stocks-beg.title: Warren Buffett Stock Picks for Beginners: 7 Safe Buys
warren-buffetts-favorite-safe-stocks-beg.description: Warren Buffett's approach for beginners: 7 safe, wide-moat stocks with durable income — each analyzed across 9 perspectives by ClaritX's free AI.

defensive-stocks-low-volatility-picks.description: The best defensive, low-volatility stocks for 2026 — low-beta picks that cushion drawdowns, ranked by ClaritX's 9-perspective AI. Free analysis.

10-best-stocks-for-beginners-with-small-.description: The 10 best stocks for beginners with a small budget (under $100/share) in 2026 — quality companies with stable dividends, AI-ranked and free.

best-etfs-to-buy-and-hold-forever.description: The best ETFs to buy and hold forever in 2026 — low-cost index and total-market funds for set-and-forget investors. Free AI analysis on each.
